name: hyperretrieval
description: Blast radius analysis, missing change prediction, and reviewer suggestions powered by git history co-change patterns and Granger causality. Zero config — works on any repo.
author: HyperRetrieval

onWorkspaceOpen.description: Auto-index repo on workspace open (git history only, <5s)

skills.name: analyze-pr
skills.description: Analyze the impact of current changes — blast radius, missing files, suggested reviewers
skills.prompt: Use the get_blast_radius and predict_missing_changes tools to analyze the currently staged or changed files. Show tiered impact (will_break/may_break/review) and suggest reviewers.

rules: When reviewing code changes, always check blast radius before approving.
Use predict_missing_changes to catch files that typically change together.
Use suggest_reviewers to find the right people for code review.
